title: Swap by Reference
description: Write a function that swaps two integers using pointers.
problemStatement:
To modify a variable from inside a function, you must pass its address. Write a function `void swap(int *x, int *y)` that swaps the values of two integers in `main()`.

**Requirement:** Call the function using the address-of operator `&`.
hints: Inside `swap`, use `*x` to access the value at the address.
The logic is the same as a normal swap, but with the dereference operator `*`.
